title: mentha belgica
intro: Mentha belgica, also known as Corn Mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It is primarily grown for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mentha belgica include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, relieve headaches and colds, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Mentha belgica include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
